user_prompt: Triage this ticket: 'My account got charged twice this month, please refund the duplicate.'
actual_output:
Priority: HIGH
Category: Billing - Duplicate Charge

Draft response:

Hi there,

I am very sorry to hear that you've been charged twice this month. I understand how concerning that is, and I would be happy to look into this for you immediately.

To get this resolved, could you please provide the following:

1. The email address associated with your OpenClaw account.
2. The date and amount of the duplicate charge as it appears on your statement.

Once I have those details, I will verify the transactions and process a refund for the duplicate charge right away.

Best,

Compass
OpenClaw Support Team
judge_reasoning: The chatbot correctly followed its instructions to triage the ticket and draft an empathetic, solution-oriented response for the customer.
